iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 07:00 — CRITICAL RISING (unchanged). No new nuclear-specific signals. Prolonged war + oil shock = increasing desperation risk. 42 + 7 (coupling) = 49.

top_signals: Oil shock: WTI passes $100, Brent at $110+ — could surpass $147.50 2008 record (NBC/Guardian)
Iran strikes 2 vessels in Hormuz — shipping insurance spiking (IRGC/UKMTO)
Pak-Afghan: 118,000 displaced, Pakistan Kandahar strikes, Afghanistan claims border post capture (Guardian/AP)
Pentagon: 140 wounded, 7 killed since Operation Epic Fury (Pentagon)
WHO 'black rain' warning from Iranian fuel depot strikes (WHO/Al Jazeera)
Lebanon: 4 killed overnight, 850+ total, IDF 'thousands of targets' remain (Al Jazeera/ToI)
North Korea: 10 ballistic missiles + 12x KN-25 nuclear-capable launchers (Reuters/KCNA)
China resumes PLA flights near Taiwan, Taiwan $40B defense budget (Reuters)
France delivers SAMP/T NG anti-ballistic system to Ukraine (ISW)
India: Modi calls Pezeshkian, diplomatic balancing act (India Today)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 07:00): ZERO de-escalation channels. Oil shock materializes. Iran strikes ships in Hormuz. WHO 'black rain' warning. 118K displaced Pak-Afghan. Lebanon 850+ dead. No ceasefire mechanisms. Global score 91 STABLE, economic pain accelerating.

latest_news.headline: Oil prices surge: WTI passes $100, Brent at $110+ — Guardian warns could pass $147.50 record
latest_news.text: WTI crosses $100. Brent at $110+. Guardian warns oil could surpass 2008 $147.50 record as Kharg Island damage compounds Hormuz shock.

latest_news.headline: Iran strikes two vessels in Strait of Hormuz — shipping insurance spikes, corporate evacuations
latest_news.text: Iran strikes Liberia-flagged ship and Thai bulk carrier. Insurance rates spike. Citi, PwC evacuate Gulf offices.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon: 140 US service members wounded, 7 killed since Operation Epic Fury began
latest_news.text: Updated US casualty count. KC-135 tanker crash in Iraq adds to losses.

latest_news.headline: WHO warns of toxic 'black rain' from Iranian fuel depot strikes
latest_news.text: Contaminated 'black rain' from fuel depot strikes creating hazardous precipitation across region.

latest_news.headline: PM Modi calls Iran President Pezeshkian — concerns over casualties and energy transit
latest_news.text: India walks diplomatic tightrope. Stresses Indian nationals safety and energy transit.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kandahar, Afghanistan claims border post capture — UNHCR: 118K displaced
latest_news.text: Pakistan hits Kandahar tunnels and equipment storage. Afghanistan retaliates South Waziristan. UNHCR: 115K Afghan + 3K Pakistani displaced.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 4 in Lebanon — IDF says 'thousands of targets' remain in Iran
latest_news.text: Overnight strikes kill 4. Al-Qatrani Hezbollah launch sites hit. 850+ Lebanon deaths. Guterres urges diplomacy.

latest_news.headline: Strategic oil release cannot fix Hormuz disruption — 20% of global supply blocked
latest_news.text: SPR release may ease prices temporarily but cannot replace Hormuz throughput. Kharg Island closures compound crisis.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION — Global war probability 86% (Day 18 07:00). NO de-escalation channels active. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100 capped: Heavy airstrikes continue across Tehran. IRGC 50th wave. Oil crosses $100/barrel. Trump mixed: 'Iran wants ceasefire' but 'terms not acceptable.' Japan/Australia refuse Hormuz. IRGC vows to 'kill Netanyahu.' (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 96: IDF strikes Beirut. Two-front war. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100 capped: France sends SAMP/T. 97 drones overnight. US talks stalled. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100 capped: Kandahar + South Waziristan strikes. 'Deadliest fighting yet.' (5) DPRK IMMINENT 68 RISING: 10 ballistic missiles + KN-25 nuclear test. (6) CHINA CRITICAL 34 RISING: PLA flights resume, Taiwan $40B defense. (7) RUSSIA-NATO CRITICAL 76: Finland nuclear hosting. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 42 RISING: Prolonged war desperation risk. KEY: Tehran strikes intensifying as Day 18 begins. Oil shock now real at $100+. IRGC escalation rhetoric (kill Netanyahu). WHO black rain environmental warning. Modi calls Pezeshkian — India diplomatic balancing act. Iran strikes ships in Hormuz — shipping insurance spiking, corporate evacuations expanding.
